arts.ttl: Everton XI vs Fulham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Everton travel to Fulham in the Premier League this afternoon looking for an upturn in form. The early bounce from David Moyes’s return has slowed in recent weeks with Everton having won just one of their last 10 in the Premier League. arts.ttl: Fulham vs Everton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Fulham continue their chase for European qualification when Everton visit Craven Cottage this afternoon. Just two points separate four teams in the battle for eighth place, a position that could yet lead to European football next season. Fulham are currently 11th and have struggled for consistency across the run-in.
